km.France: ប្រទេសបារាំង

zh.lifeSummary: Rostaing II DE SABRAN於1025年出生在法國。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1060年享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rostaing II DE SABRAN于1025年出生在法国。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1060年享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: SABRAN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Eliyahu, Hersh, Hyman, Mayer, Nadav, Zev.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic); Hungarian (Sáfrán); Croatian and Slovenian (Šafran); Czech and Slovak (Šafran and Šafrán): from Middle High German saffrān, German Safran, Hungarian sáfrány, Slavic šafran (standard Slovenian is žafran; see below) ‘saffron’, a bright yellow spice and colorant derived from the stigmas of a crocus, hence a metonymic occupational name for a spicer or a nickname for someone with reddish-yellow hair. The word is ultimately derived from Arabic zaʿfarān. The Jewish name is mainly artificial.
Americanized form of Polish Szafran and Slovenian Žafran: from Polish szafran, Slovenian žafran ‘saffron’, words of the same ultimately Arabic origin as above.

variants.name: Shafran
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Simcha, Avi, Meyer, Shoshana, Tsilya, Uri.  Russian Anatoly, Mikhail, Natalya, Oleg, Semyon, Yuriy.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): mainly artificial name, cognate with Safran , from eastern Yiddish shafran, Polish szafran ‘saffron’.

variants.name: Szafranski
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Bogdan, Halina, Krzysztof, Miroslaw, Stanislaw, Tadeuz, Wieslaw.

Polish (Szafrański): habitational name for someone from either of two places called Szafranki in Masovian and Podlaskie voivodeships, or Szafranów, in Masovian and Podkarpackie voivodeships, all named with szafran ‘saffron’ (see Safran 1). Compare Safranski .

variants.name: Szafran
meanings: Polish, Rusyn (from Poland), and Jewish (from Poland): from Polish szafran ‘saffron’, a topographic name for someone who lived where the saffron crocus grew, a metonymic occupational name for a spicer, or possibly a nickname for someone with yellow hair. See also Safran .

variants.name: Saffran
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Safran  .

variants.name: Safranek
meanings: Czech (Šafránek): from a diminutive of Czech šafrán ‘saffron’ (see Safran ), applied as nickname for someone with reddish yellow hair.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Rostaing II DE SABRAN was born in 1025, in France. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1060, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Rostaing II DE SABRAN est né en 1025, à France. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1060, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Rostaing II DE SABRAN wurde 1025 in Frankreich geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1060 im Alter von 35 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Rostaing II DE SABRAN è nato il nel 1025 nel Francia. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1060, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rostaing II DE SABRANは1025年にフランスで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1060年に35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rostaing II DE SABRAN(은)는 1025년 프랑스에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1060년 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Rostaing II DE SABRAN nasceu em 1025, em França. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1060, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Rostaing II DE SABRAN родился в 1025 г. в местности Франция. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1060 г. в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Rostaing II DE SABRAN nació en 1025, en Francia. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1060, a la edad de 35 años.
